title: EVA songs tabbed or sheet music

wikitext:
[]: EVA songs - tabbed, or sheet music             Quote Post by Voland » Sat Nov 27, 2010 9:08 pm Hi guys, not been here for a while...all my time is being sucked away by unimportant things. I should have more time for EVA -_- anyways, was looking through the web, and I can´t find anything else but Cruel angel´s thesis on guitar :( there´s a single Thanatos pro tab, and I use a mac...so no go for me :( Does anyone have tabs or sheets they wrote up themselves? Any song, I´m happy to play ^^

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Nov 27, 2010 9:35 pm Relevant: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1586 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=324 Here's my complete archive of sheet music: http://www.evamonkey.com/sheet_music/evangelion-sheet-music.zip Go nuts.

[]:             Quote Post by Voland » Sun Nov 28, 2010 8:18 am you just made my month thanks!

[]: Komm Susser Tod sheet music/tabs?             Quote Post by lilim » Tue Dec 07, 2010 1:51 pm my boyfriend has been learning bass the last year and last night when hunting for sheet music or tabs for learning Komm Susser Tod but couldn't find anything. eventually he just watched other people play it on youtube and pouted. so i said i'd try to help, and figured someone here might know where i could find something like this? hopefully.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Dec 07, 2010 1:58 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Here's my complete archive of sheet music: http://www.evamonkey.com/sheet_music/evangelion-sheet-music.zip

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Tue Dec 07, 2010 7:34 pm thank you so much!
